Class GeoModule

java.lang.Object
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.Module
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.module.SimpleModule
org.springframework.data.geo.GeoModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.fasterxml.jackson.core.Versioned, Serializable
@Deprecated(since="4.0", forRemoval=true) public class GeoModule extends com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.module.SimpleModule
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
since 4.0, use GeoJacksonModule instead.
Custom module to deserialize the geo-spatial value objects using Jackson 2.
Since:
1.8
Author:
Oliver Gierke
